1020701.name: Coerced Regret
1020701.desc:
- In a clash, the target has -1 Clash Power if they have 3+ types of negative effects
- When this unit is alive, enemies affected by [VibrationExplosion] gain 2 Defense Level Down. (Once per enemy per turn)
- Mental Corruption: If at less than -25 SP at Turn End, gain 2 Bind and 1 Blunt Power Up next turn

1020711.name: Coerced Regret
1020711.desc:
- In a clash, the target has -1 Clash Power for every 3 types of negative effects it has (Max -2 Clash Power)
- When this unit is alive, enemies affected by [VibrationExplosion] gain 2 Defense Level Down. (3 times per enemy per turn)
- Mental Corruption: If at less than -25 SP at Turn End, gain 2 Bind and 1 Blunt Power Up next turn

1020721.name: Repression Work
1020721.desc: In a clash, the target of the slowest ally has -1 Clash Power if they have 3+ types of negative effects
